title: iris persica subsp. sieheana
intro: Iris persica subsp. sieheana, also known as Siehe's Persian iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iris persica subsp. sieheana include treating various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to reap its health benefits.
